_comment: ClawUp deployment manifest. Assumption: ClawUp UI reads this file to configure the deployment environment, runtime, and lifecycle hooks. Adjust field names if the organiser provides a different schema.
name: clawcourt-pipeline

on_deploy.description: Register this agent on ERC-8004 IdentityRegistry on GOAT Network. Runs once per deployment. Safe to re-run — checks for existing registration before minting.

GATEWAY_PRIVATE_KEY.description: Private key of the gateway wallet (holds gas only — no user funds)

IDENTITY_REGISTRY_ADDRESS.description: ERC-8004 IdentityRegistry address on GOAT mainnet

AGENT_JSON_URI.description: Public HTTPS URL of this agent's /agent.json (used as the ERC-8004 token URI)

LOG_FILE_PATH.description: Path where pipeline writes the shared log for the dashboard

MOCK_MODE.description: Set to true to use mock events instead of live chain polling

healthcheck.description: Pipeline is healthy if log.json was written within the last 30 seconds
